## Quality Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, tokens, or API keys
- [ ] HTML escaping applied to any user/API-sourced data in innerHTML
- [ ] API routes wrapped in `apiHandler()` error wrapper
- [ ] New database queries use parameterized statements (no string concatenation)
- [ ] Biomechanics estimates include citations
- [ ] UI renders correctly on mobile (375px) and desktop (1440px)
